chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1342 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For hearing of CMA No.5190/2022 (S/A) 2. For hearing of main case 24.11.2022 Mr. Sarfraz A. Akhund, Advocates for the petitioners. Mr. Ahmed Ali Shahani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh along with Anees-ur-Rehman Buriro (Mukhtiarkar, New Sukkur) and Faizan Latif (S.H.O./Sub-Inspector, Anti-Encroachment Force, District Sukkur)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Para-wise comments and statement are filed by respondents No.7 and 9, respectively, which are taken on record. With the consent of learned Counsel for the petitioners as well as learned A.A.G. Sindh, instant Constitutional petition is disposed of with direction to Anti-Encroachment Tribunal, Sukkur to decide the pending application of the petitioners (applicants therein) filed under Section 13 of the Sindh Public Property (Removal of Encroachment) Act, 2010 being Application No.37 of 2022 after adopting the procedure laid down under sub-section of Section 14 of the Act. Petition stands disposed of in the above terms along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
